creator: roger.marsh@btinternet.com
text:
Occurred on freebsd-update -r 14.1-RELEASE upgrade from 14.0.

Looking back at upgrade from 13.2 to 14.0 I must have found bug 273661 because there is a __string directory which I must have downloaded and copied to
/usr/include/c++/v1/ on my FreeBSD boxes.

The box just upgraded to 14.1 does not have __string in /usr/include/c++/v1/.

Is the __string directory on the 14.0p6 boxes the one to put in 14.1, and if not where do I get it.

Apologies for accidentally creating bug before typing this comment.
